name: Onboarding WF4 — Discovery Call Processing (Webhook → AI → Notion + Drive + GitHub)

nodes.name: Meeting Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives webhook from BlueDot (transcript ready) or Calendly (invitee.created for Discovery Call events). For Calendly events, the workflow waits for the transcript. For BlueDot, the transcript is included in the payload. Can also be triggered by a calendar event integration.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "owner": "YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME",
  "name": {{ JSON.stringify($('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.github_repo_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.github_repo_name) }},
  "description": {{ JSON.stringify('Veteran Vectors client project \u2014 ' + ($('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.company_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.company_name)) }},
  "private": true,
  "include_all_branches": false
}

nodes.name: GitHub: Create Repo from Template
nodes.notes: Creates a new private GitHub repo from the 'vv-client-template' template repo. The template repo should contain all 8 Skills files pre-loaded in a Skills/ folder. Replace YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME with your GitHub username. Create the template repo once with: Skills/*.md files, a README, and mark it as a template in GitHub Settings.

nodes.name: GitHub: Upload Transcript
nodes.notes: Uploads the BlueDot transcript to the client's GitHub repo. Uses native GitHub node (File > Create).

values.content:
=You are a business consultant for Veteran Vectors, an automation consulting firm that helps small businesses (2-20 employees) automate their operations using n8n, Notion, and AI tools.

Analyze this discovery call transcript and produce FOUR clearly separated sections. Use the exact section markers shown below.

===MEETING_NOTES===
1. MEETING SUMMARY (2-3 paragraphs covering what was discussed, key themes, and overall assessment)
2. KEY PAIN POINTS (bulleted list of specific problems the client described)
3. BUDGET/TIMELINE mentioned (any numbers, dates, or constraints discussed)
4. NEXT STEPS (what was agreed upon at the end of the call)

===PROPOSAL===
Write a detailed proposal draft including:
- Executive Summary (2-3 paragraphs, conversational tone)
- Recommended Automations/Solutions (specific systems to build with details)
- ROI & Hours Saved (estimate hours saved per month and dollar value at $50/hr)
- Suggested Timeline (week-by-week implementation roadmap)
- Investment/Pricing (recommend setup cost range and monthly retainer range based on scope)
- Why Veteran Vectors (3-4 differentiators relevant to this client)
- Case Studies (reference relevant VV case studies: defense consulting firm, insurance FMO, AI talent marketplace)

===IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE===
Write a step-by-step implementation guide:
- Phase 1: Discovery & Data Model Design (what to map out)
- Phase 2: Core System Build (which automations to build first)
- Phase 3: Integration & Testing (how to connect systems)
- Phase 4: Training & Handoff (client training plan)
- Tools Required (list specific tools: n8n, Notion, etc.)
- Estimated Timeline per phase

===ACTION_ITEMS===
Return a JSON array of action items. Each item must have exactly these fields:
[{"task": "description", "owner": "Anthony" or "Client", "priority": "high" or "medium" or "low"}]
Include 5-10 action items extracted from the call.

TRANSCRIPT:
{{ $('Extract Form Data').item.json.transcript.substring(0, 12000) }}

parameters.commitMessage: Add AI-generated proposal draft from discovery call
Add AI-generated implementation guide from discovery call

nodes.name: Save GitHub Repo to Notion
nodes.notes: Stores the GitHub repo name on the contact so WF_STEP4B (Audit Call) can reference it later.

parameters.subject: =Veteran Vectors — Proposal for {{ $('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.company_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Proposal for {{ $('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.company_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.company_name }}

Hi {{ ($('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.contact_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.contact_name || '').split(' ')[0] }},

Great chatting with you! As promised, here’s a summary of what we discussed and what I’m recommending for {{ $('Extract Contact Info').item.json?.company_name || $('Extract New Contact Info').item.json?.company_name }}.

{{ $json.proposal.substring(0, 3000).replace(/\n/g, '
') }}

Next Steps:

  1. Review this proposal and share any feedback
  2. Schedule an audit call so we can dive deeper: Book Audit Call
  3. We’ll refine the scope and prepare a formal Statement of Work

Looking forward to it!

— Anthony, Veteran Vectors

nodes.name: Draft Proposal Email
nodes.notes: Creates a DRAFT proposal email for Anthony to review before sending. Uses Gmail createDraft operation. Replace YOUR_AUDIT_CALENDLY_LINK with the actual Calendly audit call link.
